Headline: #60 Blue Island/26th Temporary Reroute at 26th/St. Louis
ShortDescription: 60 Blue Island/26th buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions, due to street blockage near 26th/St. Louis.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#60 Blue Island/26th buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via 26th, Kedzie, Cermak, Central Park, 26th and over regular route due to street blockage near 26th/St. Louis.

Allow extra travel time.
